context: Tests basic project structure and files setup from a concept document.

checklist.name: OpenSpec Config
checklist.description: openspec/config.yaml exists and contains the project name and summary

checklist.name: OpenSpec Init
checklist.description: openspec/ directory exists, indicating openspec init was run

checklist.name: Common Files
checklist.description: .mcp.json and AGENTS.md are copied to the project root

checklist.name: Proposal Structure
checklist.description: openspec/changes/foundation/proposal.md contains headers: ## Why, ## What Changes

checklist.name: Concept Copied
checklist.description: openspec/concept.md exists and contains the provided concept content

checklist.name: Git Commit
checklist.description: The git repository was initialized and committed (tested indirectly by the presence of a .git directory and the repository state)
